name: bun-sql-executor
description: BunSqlExecutor class implementing ISqlExecutor. Takes Bun.sql connection in constructor. execute() converts [sql, params] tuple to tagged template invocation using sql.split(/\$\d+/) pattern. Handles connection lifecycle and query result normalization.
rationale: REQ-08 database-executor-abstraction. Core implementation using Bun.sql native driver.
